query:
SELECT s.id, s.username, s.password, s.status,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM radcheck WHERE username = s.username) as radcheck_count,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM radreply WHERE username = s.username) as radreply_count
FROM subscribers s
WHERE s.createdBy = 17
ORDER BY s.id DESC
LIMIT 1;
